Thomas Tarkoff, Esq. 415-554-3962 925-260-7086 City and County of San Francisco, Tom.Tarkoff@sfcityattorney.org for Defendant.

ARGUED. Ms. Contrearas seeks clarification from the court re what needs to be produced. The Court shares its views. Mr. Tarkoff argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CHARLES KELLEY's Motion For Protective Order Precluding Production Of Postincident Personnel Records And To Approve Stipulated Protective Order Governing Documents Produced By All Parties.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for a protective order is granted in part and denied in part.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
